notes: "Thinks between sessions" claimed cognition the software does not perform: nothing runs while a session is closed. What is true — and what the rest of the page already says — is that the world-model PERSISTS and the work COMPOUNDS: models, theses, ledgers, weight registers and venture books are all there when you come back, deeper than you left them. The tagline now says exactly that: "The investment research terminal whose work compounds between sessions." Docs-only; no code change.
